title: Ukrainian Mushroom Dumplings
description: A hearty and savory dish featuring Ukrainian-style dumplings filled with sautéed mushrooms and served with a side of fermented vegetables.
instructions: Combine flour and warm water in a large mixing bowl to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of sautéed mushroom mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with fermented vegetables on the side.
